scope_note: This school does not yet have a source-backed per-major enrollment breakdown in Goal Kicker. This panel shows the structured undergraduate majors inventory currently stored in the knowledgebase.
titles: The included work should be your best and most recent work.
If possible, the work should be related to your area of interest.
notes: explicit official page sentence; titles extracted from official page: https://undergraduate.admissions.gwu.edu/first-year-applicants
